creator: james@nexis.net
text:
On Mon, 23 Jun 1997 itojun@itojun.org wrote:

> perl 5.004_01 is already there. /usr/ports/lang/perl5/Makefile
> need to be updated.

To whoever updates the perl5 port.  If the installed binary changes from
${PREFIX}/bin/perl5.004, please send me a note so that I can ramp up
changes to the p5-* ports beforehand.

Thanks.

--
j.
